utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 corresponding sections appear in the final coverage plan. Check for full specification with required details: - health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes description mentioning comprehensive physical and mental coverage and a cost (€330/month). Fully specified. - property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes description for Paris residence including fine art and electronics, and cost (€90/month). Fully specified. - travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan includes description of dual-policy structure for EU and India/Asia with combined cost (€225/month). Cost is clear; though two sub-costs are listed in description, a total cost field is provided. Fully specified. - additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan includes Premium Insurance Membership with cost (€20/month). Fully specified. - total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly (€665/month) and annual (€7980/year). Fully specified. Therefore, 5/5 items are included and specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: PrimeCare Package (comprehensive physical and mental health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium (Europe) and EliteTravel Premium (India & Asia), and Premium Insurance Membership. From the ground-truth ratings, the closest matches are: for health, PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health rating 10) and PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health rating 10). Since the plan bundles both, we reflect both PrimeCare Premium Plan entries. Property coverage maps exactly to PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 10). Travel coverage lists PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 10) and EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 10). Additional services maps to Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10).
